title: EinsEinundzwanzigElf
description: Play the Create mod on the newest version of Minecraft. Multiplayer tested.
body:
<details>
  <summary>TL;DR</summary>


<details>
  <summary>Version 2.1.9 Update (Voxy Server)</summary>
  There is a new mod named "Voxy Server" in the mods folder.
  The voxy mod is now needed on the server, too. Before having the "voxy server" mod the mod "voxy" had to be deleted from the server's mods folder. Both have to be present in the mods folder to speed up chunking even more.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Version 2.1.0 Update (RoadWeaver)</summary>
  Fully compatible with old worlds but roads are not visible on already discovered land.
  RoadWeaver roads do only generate "in mind" when the chunk is already discovered. 
  They will not be rendered. The special RoadWeaver Road Map ("H") will show them but you will never see them being there.
  
To have roads being woven it is recommended to start over with a fresh world.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Version 2 Update: Starter-Kit Warning!</summary>
  If you do not want to start a new world with this then **before updating** do the following:
  
**Put everything you wear or have in your inventory into chests.** The Starter Kit mod will overwrite all of your armor with empty space when it runs the first time. You'll get a bed and a waystone, a wooden sword and 9 breads.
</details>

<details>
<summary>6GB of RAM needed</summary>

The biomes mod and all of the structures along with the optimizations and QoL mods want to have more RAM than usual.
The standard value of 0.5GB just is not enough.
With 6GB you are fine. 4GB may possibly work, too.


</details>



<details>
  <summary>Shield Hint</summary>
The new shield mechanics eats 50% of each damage event away. But fumbling with interactive blocks and equipped shield not always works.
For configuring Storage Drawers or peal logs and casing them with ingots this only works when the shield is taken off.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Village Hint: Don't be a thief</summary>
Breaking blocks, taking things out of chests in a "protected area" and being seen doing so will bring down your reputation quickly. The villagers will not trade with you anymore. And worse, they will chase and kill you. You can see your status approaching a villager with an emerald held. Learn more about this in the
  "https://modrinth.com/mod/thief" description.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Setting up your own server</summary>


In summary you first set up your single player installation as usual. Then copy it to the server and then delete some client-only mods. That was it.

Now in detail:

1. Install the correct Fabric version on your server (Server Hosts do have scripts for this. You simply click on the right button.)
2. Run the server and visit the world. Stop the server.
3. Upload the mods folder and the config folder of your tested local installation into the server's mods and config folders. I use "FileZilla" for that. (filezilla-project.org)
4. Delete the client-only .jar files from the server's mods folder:
   - CrashAssistant (if in this version)
   - lighty
   - sfcr (if in this version)
   - voxy ( delete it only if the modpack version is smaller than 2.1.9)
   - yet another config lib (if in this version, lib for better clouds)
5. Change some values in the server.properties file:
   - allow-flight=true
   - force-gamemode=true
   - online-mode=true
   - simulation-distance=5
   - motd=what your friends see in the server list
6. Run

</details>

<details>
<summary>More mods to come</summary>

There were some mods in my older modpack which I am waiting for to come to 1.21.11:

- [ ] Bank
- [ ] Tank
- [ ] Curvy Pipes
- [ ] Sophisticated Storage
- [ ] Sophisticated Backpacks
- [x] ~~RoadWeaver~~ (2026-03-13 in version 2.1.0)
- [x] ~~Thief~~ (2026-02-28 in version 2.0.0)
- [x] ~~Immersive Aircraft~~ (2026-06-07 in version 2.1.13)
- [ ] Polymorph

As soon as one of those makes it to 1.21.11 Fabric it will become part of this modpack.

</details>




<details>
<summary>What is the meaning of the word "EinsEinundzwanzigElf"?</summary>

Glad you asked. These are 3 words, camelcased.
- Eins = 1 (one)
- Einundzwanzig = 21 (twenty-one)
- Elf = 11 (eleven)

These are German words for the numbers 1, 21 and 11.
It indicates that this modpack is for MC 1.21.11.

</details>



</details>


Modpack purpose: Everything is craftable with "[Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)" and "[Nerfad](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-nerfad)". No waiting for the blocks right in front of you to become manifest: With Sodium and Voxy the new world is generated further away and not right before your next step.

The project "[Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)" has ported the Create mod in its newest version to Minecraft 1.21.11. Profit from all the new Minecraft features and build your Create-factory. With the Voxy mod you may be too distracted and just explore the world as you can see structures from far away. For the beginning with the Create mod dripstone caves, slimes and lava lakes need to be found.  Exploring the world is as important as enjoyable.

![Farming Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/etAd1e9s/images/0031fc1866dd918fc233e671e64b3b3f86951beb.png)


Mass storage systems are [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) and the new Create storage system as well.

The world looks beautifully with the "[Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)" mod and holds lots of treasures for you.

In addition to the standard iron and andesite alloy production chains with the "[Create: Nerfad](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-nerfad)" mod you can now also generate minecraft goods like diamonds, glowstone, quartz and even netherite scrap or wither skeleton skulls in your Create factory.

With some little modifications the working single player setup will run on your server. Look into the spoiler "Setting up your own server".

The test server for EinsEinundzwanzigElf is 
```
konitor-mc.de
```
(A thousand thanks to Google AI for big help in setting the server up)


![Server Toast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/etAd1e9s/images/82ef830f2543662d597708346359aeb154616bea.jpeg)

Not Enough Players. You are invited to help testing.

We have good armor made of obsidian and super elemental swords. Waypoint teleporting and gliders. With everlasting abilities you will finally become a fire resistant bird. Craft waystones and connect your base to the nether and your trusted librarian. With mineral chance no strip mining is needed to start: Just dig out the cellar of your base to get diamonds and other stuff.  Many QoL mods help you to focus on the main thing:

Building your factory.
